heading: African Development Fund; United States participation
label: 290g African Development Fund; United States participation
text: The President is hereby authorized to accept participation for the United States in the African Development Fund (hereinafter referred to as the “Fund”) provided for by the agreement establishing the Fund (hereinafter referred to as the “agreement”) deposited in the Archives of the United Nations.
notes: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 94–302, title II, § 20190 Stat. 593May 31, 1976“This title [enacting this subchapter] may be cited as the ‘African Development Fund Act’.”
amendments: Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 94–302, title II, § 20190 Stat. 593May 31, 1976“This title [enacting this subchapter] may be cited as the ‘African Development Fund Act’.”
